svg.title: Control statements complete revision map
svg.desc: All control statements grouped: Conditional if else switch, Loops for while do-while forEach, Jump break continue return

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Revise if else and switch statements with examples')
sendPrompt('Revise for while do-while forEach loops with examples')
sendPrompt('Revise break continue and return with examples')
sendPrompt('Explain if else if else chain with slider example')
sendPrompt('Explain switch statement with break and default')
sendPrompt('Explain ternary operator as a shortcut for if else')
sendPrompt('Explain for loop with counter animation')
sendPrompt('Explain while loop with condition check')

svg.text: if/else → yes/no decision | switch → many options | for → known count | while → unknown count
break → stop early | continue → skip one | return → exit function with value
